benchmark_name: Benchmarking spatial and single-cell transcriptomics integration methods for transcript distribution prediction and cell type deconvolution
dataset: 45 paired spatial-scRNA-seq datasets and 32 simulated datasets
metric_definition: Benchmark performance for cell type deconvolution from spatial transcriptomics spots
result_text: cell2location is supported as among the top-performing methods for cell type deconvolution of spots, alongside SpatialDWLS and RCTD; do not claim unique best.
evaluation_protocol: Comparative evaluation of spatial transcriptomics integration/deconvolution methods across paired and simulated datasets
paper_title: Benchmarking spatial and single-cell transcriptomics integration methods for transcript distribution prediction and cell type deconvolution
notes: Human-reviewed benchmark fact from recommendation evidence coverage review; qualitative conclusion only; no numeric score invented.
